mapper.select: SELECT * FROM approval_message_consume_log WHERE event_id=#{eventId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_message_consume_log (event_id, application_id, consume_status, consumer_name, retry_count, claim_token, lease_until, attempt_no, started_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{applicationId}, 'PROCESSING', #{consumerName}, #{retryCount}, #{claimToken}, #{leaseUntil}, #{attemptNo}, #{startedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_message_consume_log SET consume_status='PROCESSING', consumer_name=#{consumerName}, retry_count=#{retryCount}, claim_token=#{claimToken}, lease_until=#{leaseUntil}, attempt_no=attempt_no+1, started_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_error=NULL, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_id=#{eventId} AND (consume_status IN ('FAILED','RETRY') OR (consume_status='PROCESSING' AND lease_until < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))

UPDATE approval_message_consume_log SET consume_status='COMPLETED', completed_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, lease_until=NULL, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_id=#{eventId} AND claim_token=#{claimToken}

UPDATE approval_message_consume_log SET consume_status='FAILED', retry_count=#{retryCount}, last_error=#{lastError}, lease_until=NULL, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_id=#{eventId} AND claim_token=#{claimToken}
